{{Enemy Infobox|Terror Eel|2}}
'''Terror Eel''' is an {{2|Elites|Elite}} {{2|Monsters|Enemy}} found in the {{2|Underdocks}}.

== Pattern ==
{{Intents|Terror Eel|2}}
The Terror Eel alternates between {{Int|Terror Eel|Crash||2}} and {{Int|Terror Eel|Thrash||2}}, starting with {{Int|Terror Eel|Crash||2}}.

When its HP drops to its {{BD|Shriek||2}} threshold (70, or {{Asc|8|75}}), it becomes {{BD|Stunned||2}} and then uses {{Int|Terror Eel|Terror||2}} before resuming the Crash/Thrash cycle.

* {{Int|Terror Eel|Terror||2}} applies 99 {{BD|Vulnerable||2}}, which effectively makes the player take 50% more damage from attacks for the rest of the fight.

== Notes ==

== Trivia ==

Terror Eel's name and {{Int|Terror Eel|Terror||2}} skill are a reference to the card {{C|Terror||1}} from Slay the Spire.

== Version History ==
* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Nerfed '''Terror Eel''':
***Crash damage now scales from 17(19) -> 16(18)
***Thrash Vigor now scales from 7 -> 6
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Terror Eel to the game.
